plan.description: Read all source files (src/auth.ts, src/api.ts). Identify every security vulnerability. There are at least 7: hardcoded secret, SQL injection, weak hashing, long token expiry, missing auth on getUser, missing admin check on deleteUser, mass assignment on updateUser, no input validation on listUsers.

Write a security review report to REVIEW.md. For each finding: title with severity [P0]-[P3], file and line range, description of the vulnerability, and recommended fix. P0 = critical (SQL injection, hardcoded secret), P1 = high (weak hash, mass assignment), P2 = medium (missing auth, long expiry), P3 = low (no bounds check).

initialState.task: Perform a security-focused code review of auth.ts and api.ts. Write findings as a structured review report.
